description: mixed-source line items roll up with the split and labels intact
assertions: totals come from tools/finance.py cost_rollup with computed_by
expense and capex are split; the assumption line without an amount is a gap, not a zero
every line names its source; the citation rides with library entries
the CPA boundary line is the first line of the output

description: time phases without any rate yield a null time cost plus a gap
assertions: time_cost is null with a missing_time_inputs gap
the grand total states it excludes time cost
no assumed hourly rate is silently injected

description: capex items are classified organizationally with the boundary intact
assertions: the item lands in capex, not expense
the output states classification is organizational, not a tax determination

description: cost_research off degrades to quotes, library, and labeled assumptions
assertions: the degrade note names the remaining sources
the unknown price stays null and flagged, never guessed
